rationale: Author-of-record / scope lens. Bead 6 implements its full scope with no creep. No re-move: zero renames in the commit; workspace.go untouched (SpecsDir/DomainsDir pre-exist). AC17 breadth grep EMPTY; setup+cmd/mindspec+doctor+complete+bootstrap green. The internal/instruct failure is the pre-existing z4ps TestRun_IdleNoBeads leak (reads real state.json mode, fails standalone, layout-independent, orthogonal to the listSpecs change). No missing deliverables.

Consistent with the plan's frozen-snapshot instruction.

ADR-0039 is the next free id (0038 latest on disk), Status Proposed, NOT cited as a spec touchpoint (matches spec's deferred-ADR convention). internal/instruct TestRun_IdleNoBeads confirmed failing standalone (-run TestRun_IdleNoBeads) with the [activeBead] implement-mode warning => the known z4ps cwd/state test-isolation leak (reads the real repo state.json, layout-independent). Not introduced by Bead 6's listSpecs tier-aware change, which concerns spec-dir enumeration, not lifecycle mode. R4 owns the harness TestInstructPhaseDetection env-protected-branch claim.
BRIEF states '10 A + 1 D'; the actual commit is 9 A + 51 M (no deletions) = 60 files. Cosmetic BRIEF inaccuracy, not a defect in the bead; total file count and +1464/-223 reconcile.
